acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors including the Ring 0 validator
Validator implements all 14 R0-S rules as a pure function
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) validateSpecRing0 is exported as a named function taking (spec: SpecDefinition, markdown: string) and returning Ring0Result. (2) All 14 rules R0-S01 through R0-S14 are implemented as individual checks. (3) R0-S01 uses ajv to validate spec against the JSON Schema. (4) R0-S05 validates Markdown H1 matches spec id pattern. (5) R0-S06 through R0-S10 check the six H2 sections exist, are in order, and are non-empty. (6) R0-S12 checks at least one FR-XX entry exists. (7) R0-S13 checks uniqueness of FR-XX and NFR-XX identifiers. (8) Function is pure — no file I/O, no side effects. PASS if all eight hold. FAIL if any rule is missing or function performs I/O.

Verify: (1) ajv v8 is imported and used with Draft-07 support. (2) The JSON Schema is loaded and compiled once (not on every call) — either via module-level compilation or a cached compiled validator. (3) No other JSON Schema library is used. PASS if all three hold. FAIL otherwise.
